Now

Derek Sivers came up with a great way to publicly declare priorities and focus through a dedicated /now page.

It’s a nice reminder for myself, when I’m feeling unfocused. A public declaration of priorities.

What I’m Focused On Now:

  • Taking care of my wife and three kids
  • Designing user experiences for VWR.com
  • Completing Relic Scout 2.0 for my (side) company Eko Wave

Completed

  • Re-launching EndOnEnd.org on WordPress (January 2016)
  • Updated: January 30, 2015
  • Moving EndOnEnd.org to Medium (Fall 2016)
  • Creating a micro blog version of EndOnEnd.org (January 2017)
